widgets_values: Steampunk old man in leather armor, based on the depth map in image1
In order to reduce noticable seams at the edges of different projections, normal_fade_power and normal_fade_min can be increased.
This workflow uses Flux.2 Klein 4B with a reference latent for enhancement, but feel free to use other models, such as SDXL with a controlnet etc.

This workflow relies on Trellis 2 for initial retexturing
(via https://github.com/visualbruno/ComfyUI-Trellis2)

First we generate a new reference based on the depth map, then do a rough texture generation in Trellis2, before texture enhancement.

This can work both for textured meshes which you want to completely retexture, or for untextured meshes that do not even have UVs yet.

Trellis2 provides the added benifit or generating new PBG maps, as well as providing infil for areas that are not covered by projection.
